title: ライバル登場、その名は……

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after the Japanese Derby, Special
Week and I visit an amusement park for a change
of pace.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow! Which ride should we go on first?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Or maybe we should start by eating something?
I've had my eyes on that popcorn bucket for a
while!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I smile as I watch Special Week excitedly struggle
to make a decision, when suddenly...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! Spe! Over heeere!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! El?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's El Condor Pasa, an Umamusume gifted with
the spirit of a pro wrestler and who aims to be
"the world's hella strongest."

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Imagine seeing you here! What a surprise!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Are you here to check out the special stage
wrestling event too?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? N-no, I'm just here to take a break with my
trainer...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I am moved! Touched! And grateful! A new pro
wrestling amigo born before my eyes!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You got it all wrong! Nothing's been born here!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Don't be shy, now! C'mon, I'll guide you through
this spectacular and soulful world!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El? Come now, you're making her feel
uncomfortable.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Yowch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder—a refined Umamusume with a
serene heart and a mighty will.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My apologies, Spe... and Spe's trainer. I'll make
sure to give her a talking-to later.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
G-Grasss! I thought you were gonna pull my tail
right off!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Because you were being too pushy! Honestly.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Grass! You're here with El?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I heard that the haunted house here has a
Japanese theme. It sounded quite splendid, so I
had to come and take a look.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: H-haunted house? You're not scared?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, as long as you remain calm, there's nothing
to be afraid of.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wooow, you're amazing, Grass!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Now then, my apologies again for the ruckus. We
must be going now. The event is starting soon.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I hope you both enjoy your time here!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: See ya, Grass!
choice_data_list: Your friends are quite a riot.
Your friends are quite a riot.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, they sure are!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
El's a passionate pro wrestling fan, and Grass
always keeps her cool. They're always energetic
and fun to be around.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But that's not all they are.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
They're also really strong. When I'm racing,
they're the two rivals that I respect the most!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, my image of Special Week is of a racer
who's surrounded by many a formidable
Umamusume.
choice_data_list: I suppose you'll race against them someday.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That's right. I'm sure of it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whoops, sorry! I got a little carried away with
myself there.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Anyway, let's have a blast today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We have a fun-filled day together at the
amusement park.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the way home...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hm? Heya, Spe! Oh, and Spe's trainer too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey Sei! Were you out and about today too?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yup. Just doing a little bit of fishing.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
By the way, I heard you made mincemeat out of
the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Which race are you aiming for next?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Next? Well...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Let me guess. Since you're aiming to be number
one, maybe you're eyeing the spring Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: The spring Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The expression on Special Week's face changes. I
can see the excitement welling up inside of her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho. It's the longest G1 race. I
know how much she wants to line up on the turf
alongside the best of the senior racers.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I really would like to race there!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
If so, then you gotta start with the Kikuka Sho. A
grueling 3,000 meters with two uphill stretches...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But it's a race you have to experience if you're
aiming for the spring Tenno Sho, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
R-right! Uh, Trainer? I wanna run the Kikuka Sho
first...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, and by the way...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I plan on running in both the Kikuka Sho and the
Tenno Sho, so I'll see ya there!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wait, what?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sei's gonna be... my rival?!
